structure.description: Inline reference token ([[Title]]) renders as link if target exists, as create-affordance if not. Click on unresolved → creates target entity with that title and switches focus. Conflates discovery (autocomplete) with creation (instantiate) into one continuous gesture.

rationale.hypothesis: In knowledge-graph products, the moment of writing about something is also the moment of identifying it — gating creation behind a separate 'New Note' dialog breaks flow. Link-as-creation lets the author defer entity-existence decisions to writing time. Cheaper than a modal, recoverable on miss (just delete the empty target).

evidence.description: [[Foo]] click creates Foo.md if missing; autocomplete shows 'Create Foo' last
Same affordance: typing [[ opens fuzzy + create-on-enter

counterexample.description: @mention requires the target to exist; creation is a separate flow — different paradigm
Issue links require pre-existing keys — creation-as-link would conflict with workflow constraints

shouldMatch.reason: Block.targetPageId references can be 'unresolved' — same affordance applicable

shouldNotMatch.reason: Position cannot be created from inline reference; symbol must exist in market data
Creation is gated by approval workflow; inline-create would bypass invariants
